search_document:
User Request: Categories overview.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Category Distribution
Type: pie_chart
Description: Percentage of products in each category
Title: Top Categories by Sales
Type: bar_chart
Description: Categories with the highest sales volume
Title: Total Products by Category
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of products available in each category
Title: Category Performance Over Time
Type: line_chart
Description: Sales trends for each category over the last year

sql_queries.title: Category Distribution
sql_queries.description: Percentage of products in each category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Products) AS Percentage FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Top Categories by Sales
sql_queries.description: Categories with the highest sales volume
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(od.Quantity * od.UnitPrice * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Products by Category
sql_queries.description: Total number of products available in each category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Category Performance Over Time
sql_queries.description: Sales trends for each category over the last year
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.Quantity * od.UnitPrice * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID WHERE o.OrderDate >= date('now', '-1 year') GROUP BY c.CategoryName, Month ORDER BY Month
